page: Google Cloud Platform m4-ultramem-56 is a memory-optimized server designed to support large-scale enterprise workloads. The instance is built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and features 56 dedicated vCPUs. With 1488.0 GB of system memory, the server provides an exceptionally high resource density of 26.57 GB of RAM per core, making it suitable for memory-bound applications.

The hardware profile is highly specialized, omitting several common components to focus entirely on memory capacity. There are no integrated GPUs, and local storage is not bundled with the instance, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage. Additionally, the server does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

This configuration is optimized for workloads such as large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and complex data analytics pipelines. The high memory-to-vCPU ratio allows organizations to run large datasets entirely in memory, reducing latency for analytical queries and transactional processing.
description: Google Cloud Platform m4-ultramem-56 is a memory-optimized server designed for workloads requiring massive memory capacity relative to compute resources. Built on the x86_64 CPU architecture, this instance features 56 dedicated vCPUs and 1488.0 GB of system memory, yielding an exceptionally high allocation of 26.57 GB of RAM per core. The server does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, focusing its hardware profile entirely on high-density memory delivery. It also provides zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This resource configuration is highly specialized for memory-intensive enterprise applications, including large-scale in-memory databases, real-time data analytics, and heavy enterprise resource planning systems where memory capacity is the primary constraint.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform m4-ultramem-56 is a memory-optimized server featuring 56 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 1488 GB of RAM, designed for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized server configuration featuring dedicated compute cores and an exceptional memory-to-vCPU ratio for memory-constrained workloads.
bullet_points: High memory density of 26.57 GB per core
No bundled local storage or integrated GPUs
Designed for large-memory databases and enterprise applications
